steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: ”Correspondingly distorted” establishes the cause-effect relationship: carbon rises → audio distorts. The transition must express what logically follows from this distortion.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: ”Thus” expresses consequence, showing that because the audio distorts with rising carbon, listeners can therefore perceive these changes. The other three don't establish this causal link: “by comparison” suggests parallelism, “for instance” introduces an example, and “furthermore” merely adds information. That matches choice B — B is correct.
